label: Fixed
items: Delaying a harvest task no longer disassociates it from its harvest window. Previously the postpone helper rebuilt the task without window_end_date, so the rescheduled task showed as a standalone one-off rather than part of the harvest range. The window date and snooze date are now preserved across postpone, snooze and bulk reschedule.

Recovery backfill: any harvest task that already lost its window context due to the postpone bug gets window_end_date restored from its parent blueprint on this deploy. The next page load should show the harvest range intact again.

Harvest window highlight on the calendar (and the in-modal window pill, the day toggle button, the running total chip, and the in-window task list card) now use the same amber palette as the Harvest task type dot, so the colour story is consistent across the app.
Internal: the dedicated harvest-window query now logs an error when it fails — silently going to empty made "missing tint" untraceable.
